headline: Teacher Workload Survey Reveals 58-Hour Average Work Week
context: NUTP's 2025 national survey of 12,000 teachers found average weekly hours far exceed the contracted 40 hours.

cards.big: Teachers work 58 hours weekly with 40% of time on non-teaching tasks
cards.sub: Administrative burden includes filing reports data entry and event planning

cards.big: NUTP survey of 12,000 teachers found 78% report chronic stress symptoms
cards.sub: Burnout contributes to 2,400 annual resignations from the teaching service

cards.big: Malaysia has a 1-to-13 teacher-student ratio but 35% of teacher time is administrative
cards.sub: Effective teaching ratio is closer to 1-to-20 when adjusted for non-teaching hours

cards.big: Shanghai reduced teacher admin time by 50% through centralized school support staff
cards.sub: Dedicated administrative assistants free teachers to focus on instruction

cards.big: Overworked teachers cannot deliver quality education no matter how good the curriculum
Should schools hire dedicated administrative staff to free teachers from paperwork
